issue_summary: Add isSupertypeOf and isSubtypeOf, deprecating isAssignableFrom. Created by MOE: http://code.google.com/p/moe-java MOE_MIGRATED_REVID=85327607
javadoc_before: /** Returns true if this type is assignable from the given {@code type}. */
javadoc_after: /** * Returns true if this type is a supertype of the given {@code type}. "Supertype" is defined * according to the rules for type arguments introduced with Java generics. * * @deprecated Use the method under its new name, {@link #isSupertypeOf(TypeToken)}. */
